nodes.name: build_docs.py
nodes.summary: Large documentation build script that generates the Archon GitHub Pages site from skill manifests, agent docs, and bundle definitions.

nodes.name: export_protocols.py
nodes.summary: Script to export Archon protocol definitions and skill interfaces in structured formats for external consumption.

nodes.name: generate-agent-cards.py
nodes.summary: Script that generates A2A (Agent-to-Agent) card JSON files from Archon agent manifests using the agent_cards module.

nodes.name: generate-llms-txt.py
nodes.summary: Script that generates llms.txt files from Archon skill and agent documentation, creating machine-readable metadata for LLM consumption.

nodes.name: README.md (scripts)
nodes.summary: Comprehensive documentation for the scripts directory, describing each utility script's purpose, usage, and expected outputs.

nodes.name: skill-compliance-check.py
nodes.summary: Script that checks all Archon skill manifests and SKILL.md files for schema compliance, required fields, and style conventions.

nodes.name: test_agent_cards.py
nodes.summary: Minimal test script for verifying the agent card generation module produces valid output.

nodes.name: test_registry.py
nodes.summary: Minimal test script for verifying the Archon registry module loads and parses archon.yaml correctly.

nodes.name: update.py
nodes.summary: Script for updating installed Archon skills and agents in ~/.claude/skills/, syncing changes from the source repository.

nodes.name: validate.py
nodes.summary: Large validation script for the Archon framework, checking skill manifests, agent definitions, bundle configs, and pipeline YAMLs for correctness.

nodes.name: indexer.py (agent-router)
nodes.summary: Indexer module for the agent-router MCP server, building and maintaining a searchable index of agent definitions for routing decisions.

nodes.name: requirements.txt (agent-router)
nodes.summary: Python dependency list for the agent-router MCP server.

nodes.name: server.py (agent-router)
nodes.summary: MCP server implementation for the agent-router, exposing tools for discovering and routing to appropriate Archon agents based on task descriptions.

nodes.name: server.py (file-ops)
nodes.summary: MCP server implementation for file operations, providing high-performance file read/write/search tools to Claude Code via MCP protocol.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml (forge)
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the forge Rust MCP server, declaring dependencies for the Rust-based code generation server.

nodes.name: test-input.json (forge)
nodes.summary: Test input fixture for the forge MCP server, providing sample request data for testing code generation endpoints.

nodes.name: indexer.py (skill-router)
nodes.summary: Indexer module for the skill-router MCP server, building a vector-searchable index of skill manifests and descriptions for semantic skill matching.

nodes.name: migrate.py (skill-router)
nodes.summary: Migration script for the skill-router index, updating the index format when the schema changes or new skills are added.

nodes.name: requirements.txt (skill-router)
nodes.summary: Python dependency list for the skill-router MCP server.

nodes.name: server.py (skill-router)
nodes.summary: MCP server implementation for the skill-router, exposing semantic search tools to find the most relevant Archon skills for a given task.

nodes.name: test-init.json (skill-router)
nodes.summary: Test initialization fixture for the skill-router MCP server.

nodes.name: .gitkeep (template examples)
nodes.summary: Placeholder file to maintain the examples directory in git for skill templates.

nodes.name: manifest.yaml (skill template)
nodes.summary: Template manifest for Archon skills, defining the required and optional fields for skill configuration including triggers, metadata, and output schema.

nodes.name: .gitkeep (template overrides)
nodes.summary: Placeholder file to maintain the overrides directory in git for skill templates.

nodes.name: .gitkeep (template resources)
nodes.summary: Placeholder file to maintain the resources directory in git for skill templates.
